calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Administrator
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court noted that Mrs. Kidd's petition was addressed to the conduct of the trustee, that no administrator has been appointed, that this petition is not in the proper case and that there is a related trust case (PTR-20-303840). The Petition to Remove Administrator is off calendar.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lee. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-04-2021 Continued To Mar-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Buggy appeared by zoom for Tanis Kidd (Beneficiary of the Stewart Living Trust/Granddaughter of the Decedent).

The Court noted that Mr. Hedemark is not present, that the trust case has been continued to February 28th for an amended petition and notice, and that it is unclear as to what the parties intend to do with this estate. The Court also stated that it appears the parties reached a settlement regarding the trust, that some issues have been pointed out by the Probate Examiner regarding the property and that it appears this matter should be continued to a date after the trust matter is heard. Mr. Buggy stated that he spoke with Mr. Hedemark last week and that they are in somewhat regular contact. The Amended Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to March 8, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Continued To Jan-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-05-2020 Continued To Nov-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-24-2020 Continued To Oct-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Hedemark, Esq., counsel for and with Norman Stewart, Jr., Petitioner (Mr. Hedemark appearing by video conferencing, Mr. Stewart Jr. present in court); Kevin Buggy, Esq., counsel for Tanis Kidd (appearing by video conferencing); Sonja Stewart, interested person (present in court); Anassa Stewart, interested person (present in court); Al-Malik Stewart, interested person (present in court).

At the Court's invitation, Mr. Hedemark addresses the circumstances of the lost will, the status of the various pieces of real property and the existence of a trust. Mr. Buggy advises the Court of the filing of a Petition pursuant to various Probate Code sections but primarily Sections 17200 and 850 [SF Superior #PTR-20-303840] which is designed to effectuate an ostensible settlement agreement among the various family members and ostensible trust beneficiaries. Ms. Sonja Stewart and Petitioner Norman Stewart Jr. address the Court.

After further discussion, the Court continues this matter to October 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. and directs Mr. Buggy to file an ex parte application advancing the current hearing date in the trust matter [currently, January 4, 2021] to October 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
